ext_description.message: The Official Wayback Machine Extension - by the Internet Archive.

exclude_title.description: Title shown on the Exclude URLs page.

exclude_description.message: Enter URL patterns below to exclude from Auto Save.
exclude_description.description: Instructions on the Exclude URLs page.

exclude_clear_all.description: Button to clear all excluded URL patterns.

exclude_reset_defaults.description: Button to reset excluded URL patterns to defaults.

exclude_placeholder.message: Enter 1 URL per line. For example: archive.org*
exclude_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the exclude list textarea.

exclude_legend.message: Use * as a wildcard. For example: archive.org*
exclude_legend.description: Help text explaining wildcard usage in the exclude list.

exclude_cancel.description: Button to cancel changes to the exclude list.

exclude_save.description: Button to save changes to the exclude list.
